name: Rolled Oat Waffles
recipeIngredient: 2 cups water (I used fat-free plain soy milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend all ingredients in a blender until smooth.
2. Let the batter sit for a few minutes to thicken.
3. Pour the batter into a non-stick waffle iron and cook until done.
(Note: I used a small Belgium waffle iron, which made 8 waffles. This yields enough for two dinners or one dinner and two breakfasts. Leftover waffles can be reheated the next day by lightly toasting them in a toaster oven.)
Makes: 2 servings.
